spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Tactile and grounded feel.

components.navigation: Bottom tab bar for mobile, sidebar for desktop. Minimalist with clear active states using a rectangle highlight or subtle primary color bg.
components.buttons: Rounded-xl, generous padding (px-6 py-3), font-medium. Primary buttons use #4A5D23 with white text. Hover states elevate slightly (-translate-y-0.5) and darken bg.
components.badges: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bold text. Used for status (Fresh/Expiring/Expired).
components.inputs: Shadcn based. 1px border-[#E6E8E3], bg-white/50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A5D23]/20 focus:border-[#4A5D23] transition-all duration-200.
components.cards: Avoid default card shadow overload. Use 1px border with a very subtle drop shadow: shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(26,32,21,0.04)].
components.charts: Recharts. Use monochromatic shades of primary green (#4A5D23, #6B8E23, #DCE8D0) for analytics to keep the dashboard grounded.

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity and slight y-axis slide (y: 10 to 0).

hero_or_empty_pantry.description: Woman organizing food in a well-stocked pantry. Use for onboarding hero or empty state background.

fresh_vegetables_bg.description: A kitchen counter with vegetables. Good for 'Recipes' section header.

cooking_meal.description: Pan filled with green beans on stove. Good for 'Smart Recipes' card image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Organic & Earthy' archetype color palette. Do not use generic blues or purples.
Implement Expiration Tracking color-coding strictly using the 'status' colors provided.
For the Inventory list, use a dense, clean layout (list_item_style). Do not put every item in its own standalone card.
Build a bottom navigation bar for mobile sizes and a sidebar for md+ screens.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, navigation links).
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the colors and border-radius to match these guidelines.
Use standard HTML inputs for simple text, but Shadcn Select/Dialog for complex interactions.
